theme_and_archetype.rationale: Cinematic, moody, and highly expensive feel using strict optical clarity glassmorphism to let the background imagery breathe without competing elements. No solid colors; reliance strictly on light, shadow, and blur.

headings.usage_rules: Use for primary display text, hero headlines, and elegant section titles. Never use generic sans-serif for headings.

body.usage_rules: Use for all UI elements, buttons, prompts, sidebar toggles, and descriptions to ensure sterile, modern legibility contrasting the serif headers.

glassmorphism_system.panel: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/5 border border-white/20 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.25)] rounded-2xl
glassmorphism_system.button_default: backdrop-blur-md bg-white/10 border border-white/20 shadow-[0_4px_16px_rgba(0,0,0,0.1)] rounded-full text-white transition-all duration-300
glassmorphism_system.input_bar: backdrop-blur-lg bg-white/10 border border-white/20 shadow-inner rounded-full text-white placeholder-white/50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-white/30 focus:bg-white/15
glassmorphism_system.modal_overlay: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-black/60 fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center
glassmorphism_system.toggle_pill_inactive: backdrop-blur-md bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white/70 hover:bg-white/10

landing_page.background_treatment: Fixed full-screen Fairmont image with slight dark gradient overlay (bg-black/30) to ensure text legibility.
landing_page.hero_section: Center-aligned flexbox. Massive spacing (py-32). Headline pairs Fairmont logo inline with 'x LoversAI' text.
landing_page.about_section: Wide central glass card (max-w-4xl mx-auto) with generous padding (p-12).
landing_page.footer: Sleek bottom glass bar (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/5 border-t border-white/20 py-8).

studio_page.background_treatment: Same Fairmont background but with heavy blur overlay (backdrop-blur-3xl bg-black/50) to prevent distraction from generated images.
studio_page.grid: h-screen w-full grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 p-6 overflow-hidden.
studio_page.sidebar: col-span-12 md:col-span-3 h-full flex flex-col gap-6 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar. Strict glassmorphism panels.
studio_page.main_canvas: col-span-12 md:col-span-9 h-full flex flex-col gap-6 relative.

hero_headline.structure: Flex row, items center, justify center, gap-4 flex-wrap.
hero_headline.elements: Fairmont Logo (h-16 or h-20) + 'x LoversAI' (Cormorant Garamond, text-5xl md:text-6xl+, text-white).

cta_button.style: glass_button massive (px-10 py-4 text-xl tracking-wide uppercase).

sidebar_upload.style: Glassmorphism drop-zone. border-dashed border-2 border-white/30 bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 transition-all rounded-xl p-8 text-center flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2 text-white/80 cursor-pointer.

prompt_bar.structure: Relative container w-full max-w-4xl mx-auto flex items-center.
prompt_bar.input: glass_input_bar w-full pl-6 pr-32 py-4 text-lg.
prompt_bar.button: Absolute right-2 glass_button px-6 py-2 text-sm uppercase tracking-wider.

canvas_display.structure: Flex-1 w-full rounded-2xl overflow-hidden glassmorphism panel flex items-center justify-center relative.
canvas_display.action: Once image loads, show absolute bottom-6 center 'Add to Moodboard' glass button.

moodboard_modal.content: Large glass panel (max-w-6xl w-full max-h-[90vh] p-8 flex flex-col gap-6 overflow-hidden).
moodboard_modal.grid: Stylish masonry or bento grid for saved images (overflow-y-auto).
moodboard_modal.actions: Flex gap-4 justify-end -> 'Download PDF', 'Download PPT' (both glass buttons).

background_fairmont.usage: Full-screen fixed background for Landing (light overlay) and Studio (heavy blur overlay).

logo_fairmont.usage: Landing page hero headline and header/nav logo.

font_reference.usage: Informs the choice of Cormorant Garamond + Manrope.

generated_placeholders.usage: Use these to populate the moodboard grid and show a 'generated' state in the main canvas.

testing.rules: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case representing their role.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application using pure React (.js/.jsx) with Tailwind CSS.
Do NOT use solid colors for any cards, backgrounds, or buttons. Rely entirely on the defined glassmorphism classes (backdrop-blur, bg-white/10, border-white/20).
Install Google Fonts 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Manrope'. Ensure Cormorant is used for headings and Manrope for body text.
The Landing Page background must be fully visible with only a slight black gradient to ensure text contrast.
The Studio Page background must use the same image but with a heavy backdrop-blur (e.g., backdrop-blur-3xl) so the user interface and generated images pop.
Ensure 'Add to Moodboard' clears the main canvas and moves the image to a global state/context for the Moodboard Modal.
Implement the Moodboard Modal with a responsive grid layout displaying the generated images.
Ensure all Lucide/Phosphor icons used have matching stroke widths to the elegant typography (stroke-1 or stroke-1.5).
DO NOT use generic Shadcn opaque cards. If using Shadcn components (like dialogs or selects), you MUST override their background and border utility classes to match the strict glassmorphism style.
